PROP-01b-partial-inv-031.text: checkUpkeep gas must be bounded: iteration over s_allowlistedAssets must not exceed block gas.
PROP-01b-partial-inv-031.assertion: forall checkUpkeep(): gasUsed <= blockGasLimit for all allowlisted asset counts

locations.note: iterates s_allowlistedAssets.values() at line 220 — unbounded loop over all allowlisted assets
